label: Controlled Pro Aggregate (pt-BR)
description: Controlled pt-BR report-generation benchmark with 120 gated text fixtures. The public repository exposes methodology and aggregate leaderboard results only; case JSON, answer keys and frozen predictions are not distributed.
notes: The current 120-case suite includes modality/anatomy/complexity quotas, 54 critical-safety cases and 23 negative-control cases. These fixtures are gated and must not be published as an open benchmark. Public comparative claims require controlled-suite verification, contamination controls and radiologist adjudication.
